finding: Deployment acceptance must fail closed when the recorded deployment decision says the run was skipped, failed, cancelled, unresolved, or returned no URL. Cryptographic and claim-level acceptance cannot override a contradictory provider-deployment record.

covered: contradictory accepted flag, decision, and reasons

evidence_strength: committed source plus isolated deterministic tests

deployment_proof.reason: No authenticated Cloudflare workflow run with valid environment credentials was available.

privacy_boundary: No credentials, account identifiers, private chat, health material, or secret values were read or emitted.
claim_limit: The consistency gate detects contradictory evidence artifacts. It does not prove a Cloudflare deployment, hostname ownership, exact served bytes, continuing availability, diagnosis, treatment, or scientific truth.
next_integration: Wire the validator after cloudflare-deployment-acceptance.json is built and before the final evidence manifest is finalized; include cloudflare-deployment-consistency.json in the retained artifact set.
